titleStmt.title: SII 17.222: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 222. (A.R. No. 200 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the ruined Śiva shrine within the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

This incomplete record commences with the praśasti, Tirumagaḷ pōla, etc., of the king. The donor Śembiyaṉ-mādēviyār is mentioned here as the queen of Gaṇḍarādittadēva and the mother of Uttamachōḷa. This queen, who, it is stated, built this temple called Śivalōkam at Tiruvakkarai in stone also figures as the builder of the temple at Tiruvārūr (vide No. 617 below).

This records the grant of the village Maṇali in Āṉmūr-nāḍu in Ōymā-nāḍu, as dēvadāṉa for god Paramasvāmigaḷ at Śivalōkam, the stone temple built by Śembiyaṉ mahādēviyār. The amount to be paid by the residents of Maṇali to the temple both in kind and in cash towards every item of provisions for worship, offerings and other connected services is given in elaborate detail.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... . ... śrī svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉa
kke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrc cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi ve
ṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷamppāṭi taṭikaivaḻiyum kuṭamalaināṭum
kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟkkoṇṭu taṉṉe
ḻil vaḷar Ūḻi yellā yāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkorājarāja rājakesaripanmaṟk
ku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu śrīkaṇṭarātitta tevar nampirāṭṭiyār śrī Uttamacoḻarait tiruvayiṟu vāytta Uṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār cempiyaṉ māteviyār
Eṭuppittaruḷiṉa śrī tiruvakkarai tirukkaṟṟaḷi civalokamm Uṭaiya paramasvāmikaḷukku tevatāṉamāka ceyta Ūr Oymānāṭṭu Āṉmurnāṭṭu maṇali Ūrār rāja
kesariyā laṭṭakkaṭava pañcavāraṉṉellu Āyirakkāṭi paḷḷip peṟu toṇṇūṟṟu Aṟu kāṭimukkāl yivai kāṭi kalamākkiya
ṉṉellu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattu Aiyṅkalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi Ivai tribhuvanamahādevi poṟk kāl ṉālāyiravaṉoṭo
kkum civalokaṉṉāṉa marakkālāl kalattuvāy Aiyṅkuṟuṇi vāci Eṟu ṉellu ṉūṟ
ṟu Aiympattu yirukalaṉetūṇi Āka vāciyeṟṟi civalokaṉāṉa marakkālāl
mutalāṉa ṉellu Aiñnūṟṟorupattu Eḻukalaṉe Irutūṇimukkuṟuṇi Ivaṟṟu
ḷ maṇaliyiṉinṟum tiruvakkaraikku Eṭutta Eruttu kūli poti Oṉṟiṉāl ṉellu Irukala
ṉey tūṇi patakku Eruttukkūli patakkāka ṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟuṉālu Erut
tukku Eruttukkūli niṅku ṉellu muppattirukalaṉetūṇi nīkki tiruvakkarai tirukkoyilukku vantu civalokaṉāṉa marakkālāl mutalāṉa ṉellu ṉāṉūṟṟeṇpattaiyṅkalaṉe yeḻu kuṟuṇi meṟppaṭi tevatāṉa maṇali Ūrār Iṭakkaṭava kācu niṟaikkallāl poṉ Onpatiṉ kaḻañceyarai
Araikkāl Itu Araivāci yeṟṟi kācuniṟaikkallāl Iṭakkaṭava tuḷai niṟaipoṉ patiṉmukkaḻañ caraiye mūṉṟu mañcāṭiyum Āṟumā Ippoṉ kācukallāl Aḻikkavum Iṉ ṉellu civaloka ṉāṉa marakkālāl ṉellaṭṭavum nivaṉtam ceytapaṭi Āṇṭārkku tiruAmutu mūṉṟu san=tikkum
Arici kuṟuṇi ṉānāḻiyāka kuṟṟu kūli Uḷppaṭa Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl ṉellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟu nāḻiyum kaṟi Amutu porikkaṟi Oṉṟum miḷakupoṭi Oṉṟumāka kaṟi Amutu Iraṇṭukku māka mūṉṟu san=tik=ku ṉellu muṉṉāḻiyum kaṟi Amutu mūṉṟusan=tikku miḷakupoṭikku tiṅkaḷ po
ṉ kuṉṟiyāka Orāṇṭaikku poṉ Āṟu mañcāṭiyum tayir Amutu muṉṟu san=tikkum tayiramutu ṉāṭurikkuṉ ṉellu muṉṉāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutukku muṉṟu san=tikkumāka veṟumilaikku ṉellu ṉāḻiyum veṟum pākku mūṉṟu san=tikku patinañcukku tiṅkaḷ poṉ kuṉṟiyāka Orāṇṭaikku kācu kallāl poṉ
Āṟu mañcāṭiyum śrīpali Eḻuttaruḷa Irāvaikku pali Aricikku ṉellu Uriyum tiru vārātiṉai ceyum ṉampikku nicati ṉelluk=kuṟuṇi Eḻuṉāḻi Āṇṭu varai kappaṭattuk=ku kācu kallāl poṉ Araikkaḻañcum tiruUṇṇāḻiyyai pariyārañceyu māṇiyaḷ Iruvarkku ṉellu nicataṅ kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum
Uvaccakaḷ talaippaṟai koṭṭuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku kuṟuṇi Uṭppaṭa Uvaccakaḷ ṉāl
varkku nicata nellu mukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār Iruvarkku nicata
nellu patakkum Āṇṭuvarai kappaṭattukku kācu kallālp poṉ kaḻañcum tirunaṉ
tavāṉañcetu tiruppaḷḷittāmamum paṟippāṉukku nicata ṉellu kuṟuṇiyum Āṇṭu
varai kappaṭattukku kācu kallāl pon Oṉpatiṉ mañcāṭiyum tiruAlakum tirumeḻu
kkum Iṭṭu tiruppaḷḷittāmam toṭuppāḷukku nicata ṉellu muṉṉāḻiyum Āṇṭu varai
kappaṭattukku poṉ kācu kallāl ṉālu mañcāṭiyum śrīkāriyañceyvārkkuṉ ṉellu
kuṟuṇiyum saṃkrān=tikaḷum maṟṟum snapanaṅkaḷum kalacaṅkaḷum maṟṟuñ cālka
ḷum kuṭaṅkaḷum peruntiruvamutukku pāṉaikaḷum caṭṭikaḷum tīrumuḷaikkup pālikai
kaḷum Iṭuṅ kucavaṉukku nicatanṉellu munṉāḻiyum tirupparicaṭṭaṅkaḷ Uṭppaṭa
maṟṟum paricaṭṭaṅkamuvaḷum veṇṭuvaṉakamuvuḷum paricaṭṭaṅkoḷḷikku nicatan ṉellu ṉāḻiyum Āka
Oru ṉāḷaikku ṉellu kalaṉe tūṇi Oruṉāḻiyuriyāka Orāṇṭaikkumāka ṉellu ṉāṉūṟṟeṇpa
ttaiṅkalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi ṉāṉāḻiṉellu ṉer Āka miḷakukkum veṟuṅkāykkum nivan=taṅ
kaṭavārkku kācu kallāl cilavāṉa poṉ Iru kaḻañce mukkālum tirumeyppūccu can=taṉattukku
tiṅkaḷ poṉ mañcāṭiyāka Orāṇṭaikku poṉ kācu kallāl Araik kaḻañceyiraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum
citārikku tiṅkaḷ poṉ kuṉṟiyāka Orāṇṭaikku kācu kallāl poṉ ṉāṟu mañcāṭiyum nontā viḷak
konṟukku nicata ney Uḻakkum tiruvamutukku muṉṟu san=tikkum ney Uḻakkāḻākkum san=ti
viḷakkup patiṉṉeṭṭukku ṉey Uḻakkāḻākkum mūṉṟu san=tik=ku śrī palikku cuṟṟu viḷakkukku Āḻākku māka
nicata ṉey ṉāḻi Āḻākkuk=ku Orāṇṭaik=ku kācu kallāl poṉ Aṟu kaḻañcaraiye ṉālu mañcāṭiyum tirupparicaṭṭat
tukkum tirunamanikaikkum Uttariyattukkum jalapavittirattukku Ōrāṇṭukku kācu kallāl poṉ kaḻañce
Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum Uttaramayaṉamum dakṣaṇamayanamum Appiyya viṣuvum cittirai viṣuvu maṟṟu
m Iṭukkuvitta grāṇa muṇṭākilum snapaṉañ cetaruḷa peruntiruvamutukku Uḷapapaṭa snapanattāl kācu ka
llāl poṉ Oṉpatu mañcāṭiyāka snapana Añciṉukku poṉ Iru kaḻañce kālum Āka kācu kallāl
Digital edition of SII 17.222 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
